No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication or economic vulnerability.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level language course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops relevant language application skills and autonomous learning habits (Target 4.4).
evidence: 具備良好的表達應用能力

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives explicitly addresses gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course objective to develop 'good expression and application abilities' in Korean can indirectly contribute to future productive employment (Target 8.5).
evidence: 具備良好的表達應用能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to infrastructure, industrialization, or technological innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit evidence addresses reducing inequalities based on age, sex, disability, race, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage protection.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and '務必使用正版書籍' (must use legitimate textbooks) promotes responsible consumption of intellectual property (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation efforts.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and '維護智慧財產權' (maintain intellectual property rights) directly supports promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives relates to global partnerships, international cooperation, or resource mobilization for sustainable development.
